title: Salvage Hunters: Classic Cars
desc: Paul and Drew check out a BMW 323i that's been sitting in a barn for 12 years. Drew wants to give the car a tasteful revamp, but Paul has a flashier plan.

title: Overhaulin'
desc: Like all VW fanatics, Hot Dog Fred has nothing but love for his old Microbus. After Chip and the team work their magic, he may fall in love all over again.

title: Fast N' Loud
desc: The Monkeys race to be the first to drop a Hellcat motor in their '79 International Scout and fetch the world record for the most expensive ever sold.

title: Diesel Brothers
desc: The Diesel Brothers continue work on their rival builds for the first ever Tour de Utah.

title: Garage Squad
desc: The team join two longtime friends to get a 1955 Chevy sedan back on the road, bringing back great memories.

title: All Girls Garage
desc: Bogi and Faye use an inexpensive vehicle to teach first-time mechanics some automotive basics; their Jetta costs only $500, and they show how to gain some knowledge without breaking the bank.

title: All Girls Garage
desc: This mid-engine classic needs to get back on the road; the crew goes through the engine to see if it needs a rebuild, then overhauls the fuel delivery system to get this build over some major hurdles.

title: Car Fix
desc: Fuller and Bumpus show what it takes to put a marine-grade LS7 into a classic '85 El Camino. There is a difference between engines built for the road and those built for the water.

title: Faster With Finnegan
desc: John Andrade Jr. returns for some redemption against Finnegan, Cotten and Newbern. The challenge this time includes a Mustang and a '79 Chevy Malibu.

title: Salvage Hunters: Classic Cars
desc: Drew and Paul are seduced by a Lotus Esprit, a car made famous by a classic James Bond film. The project starts with a lover affair but becomes their biggest and most expensive restoration to date.

title: Roadworthy Rescues
desc: Derek has had a '55 Pontiac Chieftain waiting for a revival, and he's keen to turn it into a tribute to the early days of NASCAR.

title: Fast N' Loud
desc: Richard decides to restore his 1937 Buick Racer to its Indy 500 roots, but setbacks threaten the project. Russell and Richard buy a '77 Blazer with big potential.

title: Diesel Brothers
desc: The Diesel Brothers plan to gather 10 of the most iconic diesel vehicles ever built, give them a complete overhaul, and auction them off in one of the wildest diesel auctions ever.

desc: In the midst of SEMA, the world's biggest car show, Chip and the A-team turn a mid-50s dog of a car into a 21st-century superstar.

title: Garage Squad
desc: World champion Bruno Massel, co-host Heather Storm and mechanic Joe Zolper assist weekend mechanics.

title: Faster With Finnegan
desc: The guys rebuild a busted-up mega truck and take on Finnegan's childhood idol in a race.

title: All Girls Garage
desc: Bogi and Faye get to play with some American muscle, as the girls bring in an all-new Dodge Challenger SRT Hellcat Widebody Redeye and add a Stage II power kit.

title: All Girls Garage
desc: The team brings back the 442 Tribute car to give it a new LS engine and finish modifying the interior for the previously-installed TKO transmission.

desc: The team join two longtime friends to get a 1955 Chevy sedan back on the road, bringing back great memories.

title: Garage Squad
desc: A one-owner 1972 Cobra Jet Torino is sitting in a storage for over 40 years, after a cracked engine block defangs it; a look into whether the Garage Squad can put the bite back in the Cobra Jet.

title: All Girls Garage
desc: Bogi and Faye get to play with some American muscle, as the girls bring in an all-new Dodge Challenger SRT Hellcat Widebody Redeye and add a Stage II power kit.

title: All Girls Garage
desc: The team brings back the 442 Tribute car to give it a new LS engine and finish modifying the interior for the previously-installed TKO transmission.

title: Car Fix
desc: The guys bring in a 1924 Model T hearse to get it running again, after it's spent the last 30 years in a museum. Then Fuller starts mocking up and building his Formula Ford race car.

title: Street Outlaws
desc: Chief commits to fall down the list on purpose to race everyone he missed on his last trip to the top. Also, Ryan and Chuck struggle to get their cars ready.

title: Salvage Hunters: Classic Cars
desc: Drew and Paul are seduced by a Lotus Esprit, a car made famous by a classic James Bond film. The project starts with a lover affair but becomes their biggest and most expensive restoration to date.

title: Bitchin' Rides: Road to the Ridler
desc: Dave and the crew start their all-aluminium Ridler build by creating a fibreglass buck; Dave realises there may be a problem with the roof.

title: Stock Trucks vs. the Rubicon Trail; Dirt Every Day
desc: Fred and Dave see how far they can get on California's 35-kilometre Rubicon Trail in 45-year-old 4x4s equipped with just a winch.

title: Return of the Rock Viper; Dirt Every Day
desc: Fred and Dave head back to Alabama to redeem themselves in their revamped V-10 powered Rock Viper. This time they have improved it with better suspension, a new transfer case and a modified roll-cage.

title: Seduced by Speed
desc: Liz Carmichael believes a three-wheeled car can challenge Detroit's gas-guzzling behemoths.

title: All Girls Garage
desc: Bogi and Faye get to play with some American muscle, as the girls bring in an all-new Dodge Challenger SRT Hellcat Widebody Redeye and add a Stage II power kit.

desc: The team brings back the 442 Tribute car to give it a new LS engine and finish modifying the interior for the previously-installed TKO transmission.
